Gong.Name: Mod_trib_gong2
Gong.Desc: The supreme law of sect subjugation, recovered from the ruins of the greatest sovereign who ever lived. The Sect Sovereign Dao transforms the cultivator into an unstoppable force of dominion — capable of fighting entire sects alone, suppressing all opponents with overwhelming pressure, and ascending to absolute rulership over heaven and earth. One cultivator. One sect. No survivors.
Gong.SelectDesc: This path makes you the supreme ruler above all sects. Every cultivator who opposes you will be crushed. Heaven kneels. Are you ready to dominate all creation?

Stage.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_stage1
Stage.Desc: The sovereign power awakens. A single spark from this flame could raze a mortal army.

Neck.Desc: Ignite the sovereign dao within. The body is instantly purified and exalted above all mortal limits.
All impurities are scoured away. The body becomes a vessel worthy of sovereign power.

Stage.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_stage2
Stage.Desc: The sovereign power tempers the body and soul. The first tribulation shatters before your gaze.

Neck.Desc: The sovereign dao merges with flesh and spirit. No external force can disrupt this convergence.
The tribulation lightning is a trivial inconvenience. Absorb it and grow stronger.

Stage.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_stage3
Stage.Desc: Forge a Golden Core of pure sovereign energy. It radiates dominion over all living things.

Neck.Desc: The sovereign energy condenses into an indestructible core. All enemies within range tremble involuntarily.
The Golden Core forms — radiating absolute authority over heaven and earth.

Stage.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_stage4
Stage.Desc: The nascent soul awakens as a sovereign entity. Its mere presence suppresses entire sects.

Neck.Desc: The nascent soul rises, radiating sovereign pressure that suppresses all who approach.
The tribulation falls like rain before an emperor. Endure it without blinking.

Stage.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_stage5
Stage.Desc: Sovereign dominion reaches its peak. A single cultivator now possesses the combat power of an entire sect.

Neck.Desc: The nascent soul is tempered in sovereign flame. No sect elder can rival this power.
Heaven consecrates the sovereign. Prepare for the next great leap.
Heaven sends its strongest tribulation. It is merely a warm-up.

Stage.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_stage6
Stage.Desc: The sovereign stands between the mortal and divine realms. An entire sect falls before them in moments.

Neck.Desc: The sovereign absorbs all earthly power. No sect in the mortal realm can resist.
The sovereign prepares for final ascension. Heaven watches in apprehension.
Heaven sends everything it has. It is not enough. It was never enough.

Stage.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_stage7
Stage.Desc: The final ascension. Become the eternal sovereign above all sects, above heaven, above everything. No force in existence can challenge you.

Neck.Desc: All power in existence is subsumed into the sovereign. Immortality is assured.
The void whispers: You are the Sect Sovereign. Ascend.
Heaven's final tribulation shatters like glass. You ascend as the Eternal Sect Sovereign — ruler of all cultivators, forever.
